arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the app bundle.

customerManagedKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Key Management Service (KMS) key used to encrypt the application data.

appBundleSummaryList.description: Contains a list of app bundle summaries.

nextToken.description: If nextToken is returned, there are more results available. The value of nextToken is a unique pagination token for each page. Make the call again using the returned token to retrieve the next page. Keep all other arguments unchanged. Each pagination token expires after 24 hours. Using an expired pagination token will return an HTTP 400 InvalidToken error.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the app bundle.

userAccessResultsList.description: Contains a list of user access results.

resultStatus.description:
The status of the user access result item.

The following states are possible:

  • IN_PROGRESS: The user access task is in progress.

  • COMPLETED: The user access task completed successfully.

  • FAILED: The user access task failed.

  • EXPIRED: The user access task expired.

email.description: The email address of the target user.

userStatus.description: The status of the user returned by the application.

taskError.description: Contains information about an error returned from a user access task.

appAuthorizationSummary.description: Contains a summary of the app authorization.

appAuthorizationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the app authorization.

appBundleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the app bundle for the app authorization.

tenant.description: Contains information about an application tenant, such as the application display name and identifier.

status.description:
The state of the app authorization.

The following states are possible:

  • PendingConnect: The initial state of the app authorization. The app authorization is created but not yet connected.

  • Connected: The app authorization is connected to the application, and is ready to be used.

  • ConnectionValidationFailed: The app authorization received a validation exception when trying to connect to the application. If the app authorization is in this state, you should verify the configured credentials and try to connect the app authorization again.

  • TokenAutoRotationFailed: AppFabric failed to refresh the access token. If the app authorization is in this state, you should try to reconnect the app authorization.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp for when the app authorization was last updated.

appAuthorizationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the app authorization.

appBundleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the app bundle for the app authorization.

tenant.description: Contains information about an application tenant, such as the application display name and identifier.

status.description:
The state of the app authorization.

The following states are possible:

  • PendingConnect: The initial state of the app authorization. The app authorization is created but not yet connected.

  • Connected: The app authorization is connected to the application, and is ready to be used.

  • ConnectionValidationFailed: The app authorization received a validation exception when trying to connect to the application. If the app authorization is in this state, you should verify the configured credentials and try to connect the app authorization again.

  • TokenAutoRotationFailed: AppFabric failed to refresh the access token. If the app authorization is in this state, you should try to reconnect the app authorization.

createdAt.description: The timestamp of when the app authorization was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the app authorization was last updated.

persona.description:
The user persona of the app authorization.

This field should always be admin.

authUrl.description: The application URL for the OAuth flow.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the ingestion.

appBundleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the app bundle for the ingestion.

createdAt.description: The timestamp of when the ingestion was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the ingestion was last updated.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the ingestion destination.

ingestionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the ingestion.

processingConfiguration.description: Contains information about how ingested data is processed.

auditLog.description: Contains information about an audit log processing configuration.

schema.description: The event schema in which the audit logs need to be formatted.

format.description: The format in which the audit logs need to be formatted.

destinationConfiguration.description: Contains information about the destination of ingested data.

auditLog.description: Contains information about an audit log destination configuration.

destination.description: Contains information about an audit log destination.

s3Bucket.description: Contains information about an Amazon S3 bucket.

firehoseStream.description: Contains information about an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream.

status.description:
The state of the ingestion destination.

The following states are possible:

  • Active: The ingestion destination is active and is ready to be used.

  • Failed: The ingestion destination has failed. If the ingestion destination is in this state, you should verify the ingestion destination configuration and try again.

statusReason.description:
The reason for the current status of the ingestion destination.

Only present when the status of ingestion destination is Failed.

createdAt.description: The timestamp of when the ingestion destination was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the ingestion destination was last updated.
